use_cases: Users can browse and select products to add to their shopping cart
Quantity adjustments with animated number transitions using +/- controls
Real-time cart total calculation with visual feedback
Streamlined checkout initiation with credit card payment entry
Removing items from cart with smooth animations
ai_summary: An interactive shopping cart and checkout component featuring product selection, quantity management, and animated price displays. Built with Framer Motion for smooth transitions and includes real-time cart totals with a minimalist e-commerce interface suitable for desktop and mobile platforms.
